case_number: Criminal Bail Application No. S-285 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 466 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 556 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 285 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 08.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Ansari, Advocate for applicants in all Criminal Bail Applications. Mr. Jawad Hussain Rajper, Associate of Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-285 of 2025. Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for complainant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-285 of 2025. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants Siraj Jatoi and Shoukat Ali Jatoi are present in Cr. Bail Apps. No. S-466 and 556 of 2025. Arguments of learned Counsels were already recorded on 27.08.2025, whereas today learned Counsel for the applicant in Criminal Bail Application No. S-285 of 2025 has though vehemently denied the contents of the FIR, however, required that the bail application be disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to decide the case expeditiously. Accordingly, the bail application stands disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of two months hereof. As to the Criminal Bail Applications bearing No. S-466 and 556 of 2025, learned Counsel for the applicant requires the same to be disposed of as not pressed on account of the applicants requiring to agitate the grounds as may be available to them before the learned trial Court, in accordance with law. Accordingly, all these bail applications stand disposed of in the above terms.

S-466 and 556 of 2025, learned Counsel for the applicant requires the same to be disposed of as not pressed on account of the applicants requiring to agitate the grounds as may be available to them before the learned trial Court, in accordance with law. Accordingly, all these bail applications stand disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E Abdul Basit
